scenarios.name: Add Liquid Glass treatment to a row of toolbar icons
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses GlassEffectContainer to group multiple glass elements, applies .glassEffect after layout modifiers, gates with #available(iOS 26, *) and provides an ultraThinMaterial fallback; baseline reaches for custom blurs or applies glassEffect without grouping/availability.

scenarios.name: Implement a prominent confirm button with glass styling
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses .buttonStyle(.glassProminent) and reserves .interactive() for tappable surfaces, with #available gating; baseline invents custom button styles or uses .interactive() indiscriminately without availability checks.
